title: Cobblemon: Mega Flygon
description: Adds a custom mega flygon for cobblemon mega showdown
body:
Adds Custome Mega Flygon filly stated with some rough animations along with Flygonite to Cobblemon Mega Showdown and Cobblemon

Ablitiy:Levitate
Base stats 
Hp: 80
ATK: 140
DEF: 110
Sp. ATK: 80
Sp. DEF: 90
SPD: 130

See image for Flygonite crafting

(Coded by me and model made by my friend Messy12)
